prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021-2023理科）最低位次约4702→4557→4326→4194→5914，2021-2024年位次整体前移（从4702逐步升至4194），但2025年出现大幅后移，较2024年后移约1720名，波动显著；2025年基准位次约5914名；该校在甘肃省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021年47人、2022年47人、2023年46人、2024年54人、2025年56人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划大幅增至82人（较2025年扩招约46.4%），扩招幅度为近年最大，将显著增加招生名额，对位次产生后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–36名区间，属于国内顶尖211高校，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（国家卫健委通报伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文），对报考心理有一定抑制；但抖音热度极高，总排名第1（综合热度约1424万），短视频平台曝光量远超其他高校，正面宣传效应显著，两者对冲后整体关注度仍处高位；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A类学科，其中材料、冶金为传统王牌，与该校工科试验班、材料类等招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与北科大优势工科方向契合；材料科学与工程（属生化环材大类）社会热度仍偏低；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约179817人）明显增加，按近年物理类占比约66.6%估算，2026年物理类考生约145600人，较2025年（121443人）增长约19.9%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；北京科技大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对西部省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生计划近年持续增加，2026年扩招幅度尤为显著，体现对甘肃生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的异常波动、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约46.4%带来的位次后移压力、甘肃省物理类考生规模增长约19.9%加剧竞争、抖音高热关注度与声誉偏负面事件的对冲效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约7611名，区间7111–8111名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）（拔尖人才计划）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、物联网工程）
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（自动化、测控技术与仪器、智能感知工程）

- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 机械类（机械工程、智能制造工程、机器人工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7111–8111名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<7111名）可重点冲击理科试验班、计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>8111名）应以三档材料、冶金等优势学科保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取机会增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including 2021-2023 Science Category) were approximately 4702 → 4557 → 4326 → 4194 → 5914. Rankings generally moved forward from 2021 to 2024 (gradually rising from 4702 to 4194), but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift, moving back about 1720 places compared to 2024, with notable fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5914. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science Category) in Gansu Province: 47 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 54 in 2024, 56 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan significantly increases to 82 (an expansion of about 46.4% compared to 2025), the largest expansion in recent years, which will notably increase enrollment slots and exert downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 35th, stable in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities with strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (the National Health Commission reported falsified transcripts and plagiarized theses), which may somewhat suppress application psychology. However, its Douyin (TikTok) popularity is extremely high, ranking first overall (comprehensive popularity about 14.24 million), with short video platform exposure far exceeding other universities, creating a significant positive publicity effect. The two factors offset each other, but overall attention remains high. It has 4 A-level disciplines: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. Among them, Materials and Metallurgy are traditional strengths, closely related to the university's Engineering Experimental Class, Materials Category, and other enrollment majors, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with USTB's advantageous engineering fields. Materials Science and Engineering (part of the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials category) still has low social popularity. The total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Gansu Province for 2026 is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 179,817). Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.6%, the 2026 Physics Category examinees are about 145,600, an increase of about 19.9% from 2025 (121,443), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province has been increasing in recent years, with a particularly significant expansion in 2026, reflecting its emphasis on Gansu student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the downward pressure from a 46.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from a 19.9% increase in Gansu Physics Category examinees, and the offsetting effects of high Douyin attention and negative reputation events, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 7611, with a range of 7111–8111.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation) (Top Talent Program)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation Category (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Intelligent Perception Engineering)
- Communication Engineering
- Mathematics Category (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Mechanical Category (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Metallurgical Engineering (Low-Carbon Smart Metallurgy and Strategic Metal Extraction)
- Mining Category (Intelligent Mining Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Safety Engineering (Smart Safety).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7111–8111, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<7111), you can focus on reaching for top majors like Science Experimental Class and Computer Category. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>8111), you should use Tier 3 majors such as Materials and Metallurgy as safety options, while also paying attention to the increased admission opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，以工科见长，文科专业规模较小但依托学校整体平台优势；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（学术不端事件），抖音热度极高（总排名第1），整体关注度仍处高位；历史类招生专业较少（仅工商管理类、社会科学试验班、外国语言文学类），受学校整体声誉影响但程度有限；该校文科相关学科评估：科学技术史A+（与社会科学试验班中的法学、行政管理等无直接对应），工商管理未单独评级；文科专业非该校传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（分化观望），汉语言/中文推荐，外国语言文学一般观望；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，按近年历史类占比约33.4%估算，2026年历史类考生约73100人，较2025年（58374人）增长约25.2%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；北京位于一线城市，对文科考生有较强地域吸引力；历史类招生计划从7人增至8人，扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2023–2025年位次稳定在1300–1450名区间、2026年招生计划小幅扩招14.3%带来的温和后移压力、历史类考生规模增长约25.2%加剧竞争，预测2026年历史类最低位次约1602名，区间1362–1842名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts from 2021-2023) was approximately 964 → 2785 → 1385 → 1309 → 1448. The best ranking was in 2021 (964th), with a significant drop to 2785th in 2022, and stabilization in the 1300–1450 range from 2023 to 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1448th. The enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Gansu Province: 11 students each year from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 7 students in 2024–2025, and a slight increase to 8 students in 2026 (an expansion of about 14.3% compared to 2025). The expansion is moderate, exerting limited pressure on ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 35th, with strengths in engineering. Its liberal arts programs are relatively small but benefit from the overall platform advantages of the university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to academic misconduct incidents), with extremely high popularity on Douyin (ranked 1st overall), maintaining high overall attention. The History Category has few majors (only Business Administration, Social Science Experimental Class, and Foreign Languages and Literature), influenced by the university's overall reputation but to a limited extent. The university's relevant discipline evaluations in liberal arts: History of Science and Technology is A+ (not directly corresponding to law, administrative management, etc. in the Social Science Experimental Class), Business Administration is not separately rated. Liberal arts majors are not the university's traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Law is moderately popular (with divided opinions), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally neutral. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Gansu Province is about 218,700. Based on the recent proportion of History Category students at about 33.4%, the estimated number of History Category examinees in 2026 is about 73,100, an increase of about 25.2% compared to 2025 (58,374), intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates. The enrollment plan for History Category increases from 7 to 8 students, a limited expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of rankings in the 1300–1450 range from 2023 to 2025, the moderate downward pressure from a 14.3% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the intensified competition due to a 25.2% increase in History Category examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1602nd, with a range of 1362–1842.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Business Administration (Business Administration (Double Bachelor's in Business and Intelligence), Accounting) (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Law, Intellectual Property, Administrative Management, Social Work (Social Management)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese, German) (Limited to English-language candidates).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1362–1842, the university offers only 3 majors in History Category. It is recommended to prioritize Business Administration and Social Science Experimental Class as main choices, with Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1362), focus on Business Administration (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class); if your ranking is near the upper limit (>1842), carefully assess admission probability.
